dependencies: Third-party vendors for POS devices and hardware
Factories that manufacture point-of-sale devices, payment cards and computer chips
Third-party customer support, software development and technology hosting facilities
risks: Disruption to supply chain or third-party delivery service providers
Temporary closure or workforce shortages at factories manufacturing POS devices, payment cards or computer chips
Increased lead times, shortages or higher costs for certain materials and components
Workforce shortages at third-party customer support, software development or technology hosting facilities
Inability to renew contracts with key vendors and service providers at same cost

regulatory_risks: Bank Service Company Act examination by U.S. Federal Banking Agencies
FFIEC uniform principles, standards and guidance
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) rule-making, supervision and enforcement
Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act compliance
Federal Reserve Board Regulation II (debit interchange rate caps)
Payment institution and electronic money licenses regulation
Georgia Department of Banking and Finance regulation (Merchant Acquirer Limited Purpose Bank)
Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) and Payment Systems Regulator regulation in UK
Federal Financial Supervision Agency regulation in Germany
Central Bank regulations in Netherlands, Ireland, Poland, Brazil, Uruguay, Singapore, Malaysia
Reserve Bank of Australia and Australian Transaction Reports and Analysis Centre regulation
Visa and Mastercard network rules and penalties
Nacha ACH network operating rules
Privacy and cybersecurity laws: GLBA, HIPAA, FCRA, FTC Act, California Consumer Privacy Act
GDPR in EU and UK (penalties up to €20 million or 4% of global revenue)
Data protection laws in Brazil, India, UAE, China
SOCI Act in Australia, EBA Outsourcing Requirements, Digital Operational Resilience Act in EU, CERT-In obligations in India
Money transmission and payment instrument licensing (state and foreign)
Anti-money laundering laws including Bank Secrecy Act (BSA)
OFAC economic and trade sanctions programs
Fair Debt Collection Practices Act
State and federal antitrust requirements
Intellectual property infringement claims
Tax law changes and OECD global minimum tax initiatives
Communications laws governing telephone calls, text messages and marketing emails

sanction_risks: OFAC sanctions on specified countries, governments, individuals and entities including narcotics traffickers and terrorists
State-sponsored cybersecurity attacks on U.S. financial system
Military or political conflicts and terrorist attacks impact
